blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,701 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
